steps.title: Identify the speaker's intended outcome
steps.content: The final phrase “to make my soothing slumberous lullaby” signals what the speaker truly seeks: inner tranquility created by the ocean's rhythms.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A states the main purpose directly: the speaker conveys longing for the ocean to impart inner tranquility.

B, C, and D respectively overstate contrast, misconstrue emotional build, and invent hesitation; none capture the yearning throughout.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
